document.source_title: Watch: Dhoni enters field at Chepauk for final home appearance of IPL 2026
document.summary: MS Dhoni made a memorable appearance at Chepauk during Chennai Super Kings' final home game of IPL 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Although he did not play due to injury, his presence during the mid-innings break was a highlight for fans. The crowd erupted in cheers as Dhoni joined his team for a photograph, marking an emotional moment in the stadium. CSK, despite Dhoni's absence, managed to post a score of 180/7 in a match critical for playoff standings.
key_takeaways: MS Dhoni appeared at Chepauk for CSK's final home game of IPL 2026.
He did not play due to a calf injury but participated in a team photograph.
The crowd showed immense support and appreciation for Dhoni.
CSK scored 180/7 in the match against SRH.
Pat Cummins took three wickets for SRH, impacting CSK's innings.
The match had significant playoff implications for both teams.
document.why_it_matters: This event highlights the emotional connection between MS Dhoni and the fans, showcasing the impact of player appearances on team morale and fan engagement, especially in crucial matches.

claims.claim_text: MS Dhoni made a brief appearance during the mid-innings break.
claims.evidence_text: Dhoni walked out alongside the rest of the CSK squad for a team photograph on the field.

claims.claim_text: Dhoni did not play in the match due to injury.
claims.evidence_text: Gaikwad confirmed that Dhoni was still unavailable due to fitness issues.
